title: Murf Tweaks
description: Custom server-side tweaks I make to my own world
body:
Welcome to Murf Tweaks! This mod adds a few server-side tweaks to the game that I play with on my own world - this mod is essentially a 'whishlist' of small design changes that I will slowly grow over time.

![Murf Tweaks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7aa317020f29ec30acd5a1b23b42b37f5843873f.png)

[![ko-fi](https://ko-fi.com/img/githubbutton_sm.svg)](https://ko-fi.com/T6T61T1SK5)

**This is the main Murf Tweaks package mod** - all mods are also available as standalone mods which can be mixed and matched

### Mod List
- [Persistent Enchantment](https://modrinth.com/mod/persistent-enchantment) - Replacement for Mending which removes XP repairing but prevents items from breaking at low durability by making the unusable, mimicing Elytra behaviour
- [Snow Settings](https://modrinth.com/mod/snow-settings) - Allows customisation for which blocks snow can land on, as well as a gamerule for enabling/disabling melting snow near torches
- [Path Under](https://modrinth.com/mod/path-under) - Allows players to place paths underneath replaceable blocks such as snow, grass and leaves

There are only three mods for now, but stay tuned for updates! :)

**Warning: Don't install this package mod AND the standalone mods at the same time, they will conflict and stuff will break.**

[Check out my other work](http://murfgames.co.uk/)

[**Wishlist my original game NIGHTMAZE on Steam**](https://store.steampowered.com/app/4584550/Nightmaze/)
